svg.title: Glide AI OS Architecture
svg.desc: Layered architecture diagram showing Intent, Authority, Execution, Generative, and Observation layers connected via EventBus and Kernel.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the GoalEngine in Glide AI OS')
sendPrompt('Explain the Dispatcher role in Glide AI OS')
sendPrompt('What does the Policy Gate do in Glide AI OS?')
sendPrompt('How does the Human Gate work in Glide AI OS?')
sendPrompt('What does the Task Router do in Glide AI OS?')
sendPrompt('What does the Orchestrator do in Glide AI OS?')
sendPrompt('What does the Executor do in Glide AI OS?')
sendPrompt('How do Workers function in Glide AI OS?')
sendPrompt('How does the Task Queue work in Glide AI OS?')
sendPrompt('What is the LLM role in Glide AI OS?')
sendPrompt('What does the ConsciousLoop do in Glide AI OS?')
sendPrompt('How does the Scheduler work in Glide AI OS?')
sendPrompt('What are Runtime Locks in Glide AI OS?')
sendPrompt('How does the Governance layer relate to the Dispatcher in Glide AI OS?')
